/**
 * Scoped Accessibility Fixes (NON layout-breaking)
 * - Fix Swiper ARIA role/attribute violations by converting slides to list/listitem and stripping forbidden aria-*
 * - Fix empty links (discernible text) for the specific Elementor sticky header anchors you listed
 * - Enforce 24x24 target size (with minimal/no layout impact) for the specific selectors you listed
 * - Prevent Allyable widget from becoming huge
 */

(function () {
  'use strict';

  // ----------------------------
  // Helpers
  // ----------------------------
  function onceStyle(id, cssText) {
    if (document.getElementById(id)) return;
    const s = document.createElement('style');
    s.id = id;
    s.textContent = cssText;
    document.head.appendChild(s);
  }

  function safeText(el) {
    return (el && el.textContent ? el.textContent.trim() : '') || '';
  }

  function labelFromImgOrTitle(a) {
    const img = a.querySelector('img');
    const alt = img && img.getAttribute('alt') ? img.getAttribute('alt').trim() : '';
    const title = (a.getAttribute('title') || '').trim();
    if (alt) return alt;
    if (title) return title;

    // last resort: filename
    if (img && img.src) {
      try {
        const file = img.src.split('/').pop().split('?')[0];
        const base = file.replace(/\.[a-z0-9]+$/i, '').replace(/[-_]/g, ' ').trim();
        if (base) return base;
      } catch (e) {}
    }
    return '';
  }

  // ----------------------------
  // 1) Swiper ARIA cleanup (fixes the CRITICAL issue)
  // ----------------------------

    'aria-selected','aria-checked','aria-pressed','aria-expanded','aria-controls','aria-haspopup',
    'aria-owns','aria-activedescendant','aria-valuenow','aria-valuemin','aria-valuemax','aria-valuetext',
    'aria-orientation','aria-autocomplete','aria-multiline','aria-multiselectable','aria-readonly',
    'aria-required','aria-invalid','aria-disabled','aria-errormessage','aria-current','aria-flowto',
    'aria-grabbed','aria-dropeffect'
  ];

  function fixSwiperAria() {
    // wrappers
    const wrappers = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="swiper-wrapper-"]');
    wrappers.forEach(wrapper => {
      // Make wrapper a list (safe, common pattern)
      if (wrapper.getAttribute('role') !== 'list') wrapper.setAttribute('role', 'list');

      // slides
      const slides = wrapper.querySelectorAll('[role="group"], div[role="group"], .swiper-slide');
      slides.forEach((slide, idx) => {

  // 2) Discernible text: the 2 empty links you listed (SERIOUS)
  // ----------------------------
  const EMPTY_LINK_SELECTORS = [
    '.elementor-section--handles-inside.elementor-sticky--effects > .e-con-inner > .elementor-element-2634cb25 > .elementor-element-2c031b69.elementor-widget-html > .elementor-widget-container > div > a',
    '.elementor-sticky__spacer > .e-con-inner > .elementor-element-2634cb25 > .elementor-element-2c031b69.elementor-widget-html > .elementor-widget-container > div > a'
  ];

  function fixEmptyHeaderLinks() {
    EMPTY_LINK_SELECTORS.forEach(sel => {
      document.querySelectorAll(sel).forEach(a => {
        const txt = safeText(a);

          const label = labelFromImgOrTitle(a) || 'Global-e homepage';
          a.setAttribute('aria-label', label);
        }

        // If it contains an image, ensure that image has alt
        const img = a.querySelector('img');
        if (img && !(img.getAttribute('alt') || '').trim()) {

          img.setAttribute('alt', label);
        }
      });
    });
  }

  // ----------------------------
  function applyTargetSizeCSS() {

      }

      /* --- Specific Elementor links that show up in your target-size report --- */
      .elementor-heading-title.elementor-size-default > a[href$="success-stories/"],
      .elementor-heading-title.elementor-size-default > a[href$="knowledge-center/"],
      .elementor-heading-title.elementor-size-default > a[href$="partners/"],
      .elementor-heading-title.elementor-size-default > a[href$="platform/"],
      .elementor-cta__button-wrapper > a[href$="partners-lobby/"],
      .elementor-cta__button-wrapper > a[href$="request-demo/"],
      .elementor-widget-container > a[href$="global-e"],
      .elementor-section--handles-inside.elementor-sticky--effects a,
      .elementor-sticky__spacer a {
        min-width: 24px !important;
        min-height: 24px !important;
      }

      /* Expand hit area a bit without moving layout (safe for headers) */
      .elementor-heading-title.elementor-size-default > a[href$="success-stories/"],
      .elementor-heading-title.elementor-size-default > a[href$="knowledge-center/"],
      .elementor-heading-title.elementor-size-default > a[href$="partners/"],
      .elementor-heading-title.elementor-size-default > a[href$="platform/"],
      .elementor-cta__button-wrapper > a[href$="partners-lobby/"],
      .elementor-cta__button-wrapper > a[href$="request-demo/"],
      .elementor-widget-container > a[href$="global-e"] {
        display: inline-flex !important;
        align-items: center !important;
        justify-content: center !important;
        padding: 6px !important;
        margin: -6px !important;
        box-sizing: content-box !important;
      }

      /* --- Allyable/Allyable panel button: prevent gigantic rendering --- */
      /* #mk-aweb-open-panel,
      [id*="aweb"],
      [class*="aweb"],
      [id*="allyable"],
      [class*="allyable"] {
        max-width: 80px !important;
        max-height: 80px !important;
      } */
      #mk-aweb-open-panel img,
      #mk-aweb-open-panel svg,
      [id*="aweb"] img,
      [id*="aweb"] svg,
      [class*="aweb"] img,
      [class*="aweb"] svg {
        max-width: 48px !important;
        max-height: 48px !important;
        width: auto !important;
        height: auto !important;
      }

  }

  // MutationObserver (Swiper is dynamic)

  }

  // ----------------------------
  // Init
  // ----------------------------
  function init() {
    applyTargetSizeCSS();

    // Run multiple times to catch late loads
    fixSwiperAria();
    fixEmptyHeaderLinks();

    setTimeout(() => { fixSwiperAria(); fixEmptyHeaderLinks(); }, 500);
    setTimeout(() => { fixSwiperAria(); fixEmptyHeaderLinks(); }, 1500);
    setTimeout(() => { fixSwiperAria(); fixEmptyHeaderLinks(); }, 3000);

  } else {
    init();
  }
